About

Proud Black Country local on New Street — a short walk from the High Street. Expect proper pints, warm service and a friendly crowd. Families welcome ’til early evening.

What’s On

  • Loading events…

Function Room

Classic décor, daylight and a small stage — perfect for 40–120 guests. Good for birthdays, wakes, reunions and club nights. Catering and music can be provided as required.

40–80 → £300

80+ → £400
